message:
style: cargo fmt across fuzz targets + repair_btrfs_parsers

Pure rustfmt-driven reformatting; no logic change anywhere. Caught up after the latest rustfmt pass touched these seven files.

* crates/ffs-cli/src/repair_btrfs_parsers.rs — `use anyhow::{Result, bail}` → `use anyhow::{bail, Result}` (rustfmt-default `group_imports`/order-by-name preference).

* fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_btrfs_send_stream.rs — `assert_eq!(...)` line wrap.

* fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent.rs — `let end = ...saturating_add(...)` reflow.

* fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_fuse_splice_mount.rs — `assert_eq!(...)` wrap on the `auto_unmount` label.

* fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_mvcc_operations.rs — multi-line `Oracle::record_commit` and `(active.last_mut(), pending_writes.last_mut())` patterns collapse onto fewer lines per rustfmt's chain-style threshold; `pre_commit_snapshots.push((..., ...))` reflows.

* fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_openfs_journal_replay.rs — `use ffs_core::{...}` and `use ffs_types::{...}` import lists reordered by name; `WalOutcomeClass` enum-variant fields broken onto their own lines per the wide-variant rule; `image[...]` slice assigns and `if cursor.next_bool() && ... && matches!(...)` predicate reflow; `persistent_dir()` `format!` chain collapse; classify_wal `match` arm reflows.

* fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_openfs_mvcc_wal_recovery.rs — same family of formatter-driven reflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
